creator: kwm@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 167436
svxlink update to 14.08.2.

Update svxlink and qtel to 14.08.2.

As part of bug #207243 which updates libsigc++20, glibmm and friends to newer versions. These versions have a hard requirement on c++11. The .2 release has several c++11 fixes that allow it to be build with the new libsigc++ and friends.
